nasb.text: He who tills his land will have plenty of food, But he who follows empty pursuits will have poverty in plenty.

esv.text: Whoever works his land will have plenty of bread, but he who follows worthless pursuits will have plenty of poverty.

cnv.text: 耕種自己田地的，必有充足糧食； 追求虛幻的，必飽受窮乏之苦。

ccb.text: 勤奋耕耘，丰衣足食； 追求虚荣，穷困潦倒。

csbs.text: 耕耘自己土地的，饱享粮食； 追求空虚之事的，饱受贫穷。
